using System;

using DesignPatterns.Behavioral;

namespace Plugin.Contracts
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Provides a registry for global::Plugin.Contracts.ICardMotion.
    /// </summary>
    [global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCode("DesignPatterns.SourceGenerators", "1.0")]
    public static partial class CardMotionRegistry
    {
        private static readonly IStrategyRegistry<string, global::Plugin.Contracts.ICardMotion> _instance = new StrategyRegistry<string, global::Plugin.Contracts.ICardMotion>(new Dictionary<string, global::Plugin.Contracts.ICardMotion> { ["alpha"] = new global::Plugin.Providers.Alpha.AlphaCard() });

        /// Gets the singleton registry instance.
        /// </summary>
